rule.name: rms-bridge
rule.sql: SELECT payload as body, topic as orig_topic FROM "$events/client_received" WHERE topic =~ '(.*)/(heartbeat|pump|data|daq|ondemand)'

params.payload_tmpl:
${json_encode( map_set(body, 'packet_type', packet_type(body, orig_topic)) 
            |> map_set('project_id', lookup_project_id(body, orig_topic)) 
            |> map_set('protocol_id', 'rms-v1') 
            |> map_set('contractor_id', lookup_contractor_id(body)) 
            |> map_set('supplier_id', lookup_supplier_id(body)) 
            |> map_set('manufacturer_id', lookup_manufacturer_id(body)) 
            |> map_set('device_id', lookup_device_id(body, orig_topic)) 
            |> map_set('imei', extract_imei(orig_topic)) 
            |> map_set('ts', now_timestamp_ms()) 
            |> map_set('msg_id', coalesce(body.msgid, body.MSGID, uuid())) ) }
